data.description: The price of FIL has fallen by 2.96% to $2.20, nearing essential support levels. The Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at 36.73, indicating potential oversold conditions. Traders are advised to monitor the situation closely for any developments.

data.title: Clean Energy to build 2nd hydrogen station for Foothill Transit, supporting low-emissions buses - partnership of over 20 years.
data.description: Clean Energy Fuels Corp, a leading provider of clean fuel, has secured a contract to construct and upkeep a second hydrogen fueling station for Foothill Transit in California. The long-standing partnership with Foothill Transit, spanning over two decades, aims to aid the agency's expanding fleet of eco-friendly buses. The upcoming station will be positioned at the Arcadia bus yard of Foothill Transit, a crucial fueling hub for its operations. Clean Energy Fuels Corp, listed on NASDAQ as CLNE, continues to drive sustainable transportation solutions with this initiative.

data.title: Riverdale Mills celebrates 45 years on National Lobster Day with their flagship product, Aquamesh®, revolutionizing the lobster trap industry.
data.description: In Northbridge, Massachusetts, on September 25, 2025, Riverdale Mills commemorated 45 years in the industry on National Lobster Day. The company's signature product, Aquamesh®, has been a game-changer in the lobster industry. Riverdale Mills has established itself as a leader in manufacturing, reflecting commitment to excellence over the years.

data.title: AL-S Pharma appoints Prof. Dr. Angela Genge, a renowned neurologist, as its new Chief Medical Officer.
data.description: In Zurich on September 25, 2025, AL-S Pharma made public the appointment of Angela Genge, MD, a Neurology Professor at McGill University in Montreal, as their Chief Medical Officer (CMO). Dr. Genge, known for her expertise in research related to amyotrophic lateral sclerosis (ALS), will now take the lead in medical matters for the company.

data.title: Trimble and Vermeer team up for automation on solar farms with Trimble Groundworks system integrated with Vermeer PD10R, boosting productivity on jobsites.
data.description: In a recent development in Westminster, Colorado on September 25, 2025, Vermeer and Trimble® unveiled the integration of the Trimble Groundworks machine control system into the Vermeer PD10R system. This innovation aims to provide an automated piling solution for the construction of solar farms, significantly boosting speed and productivity. This advancement is expected to streamline the construction process and improve efficiency, catering to the growing demand for renewable energy infrastructure. Stakeholders anticipate a notable increase in efficiency and output with this new system, which combines specialized technology to enhance construction practices in the industry.

data.title: South Park features Polymarket and Kalshi in latest episode, surprising prediction market users.
data.description: The latest episode of South Park highlighted Polymarket and Kalshi, surprising users of prediction markets.

data.title: Global pet adoption awareness campaign Remember Me Thursday® lights up the world, uniting animal lovers and celebrities. 13th annual event on Sept. 25, 2025. #ShineALight.
data.description: Today marks the 13th annual Remember Me Thursday® (RMT) global movement, where animal-lovers worldwide are coming together to #ShineALight. Celebrities, animal welfare organizations, and individuals are uniting to raise awareness about pet adoption and encourage people to consider giving loving homes to shelter animals. This event, taking place on September 25, 2025, aims to shed light on the importance of pet adoption as a means to save the lives of orphaned pets. Supporters are urged to share their stories and spread the message on social media using the hashtag #ShineALight. This initiative serves as a call to action, emphasizing the impact individuals can make by adopting pets in need.

data.title: American Bitcoin appoints KPMG as new auditor, effective Sept. 25, 2025; trading as Nasdaq: ABTC.
data.description: In Miami on September 25, 2025, American Bitcoin Corp. (Nasdaq: ABTC) has announced the appointment of KPMG LLP as its independent auditors. American Bitcoin, a leading Bitcoin accumulation platform dedicated to developing the US Bitcoin infrastructure, made this decision to enhance its financial oversight. This move underlines the Company's commitment to transparency and accountability.

data.title: Key data on vidofludimus calcium presented at ECTRIMS:- Showed statistically significant 24-week confirmed disability improvement in progressive MS- Over two-fold probability over placebo- Positive effects across subtypes.
data.description: In the Phase 2 CALLIPER trial for progressive multiple sclerosis, Vidofludimus Calcium showcased a substantial improvement in confirmed disability over 24 weeks. The study revealed a more than double likelihood of improvement compared to the placebo among the overall study group. This effect was also consistently observed across different subtypes of multiple sclerosis. The positive results of this trial suggest the potential of Vidofludimus Calcium in treating progressive multiple sclerosis.

data.title: VIAVI expands ONE LabPro® ONE-1600 to 1.6Tb. New module aids AI demands. CHANDLER, AZ, Sept 25, 2025. (NASDAQ: VIAV) #technology #innovation
data.description: VIAVI Solutions Inc., based in Chandler, Arizona, announced on September 25, 2025, that they have launched the new ONE1600ER module, which, when combined with upgrades made to the MAP-300 portfolio, equips customers to address the increasing requirements driven by artificial intelligence. This development builds on the success of their renowned ONE LabPro® testing platform. The company, traded on NASDAQ under the symbol VIAV, continues to innovate with these new additions to their product line in order to meet the growing demands of the market.

data.title: AAVE price at $270.17 (-2.57% in 24h) with support nearing $270. Governance plans to reduce daily emissions from 390 to 300 AAVE tokens.
data.description: The cryptocurrency AAVE is currently trading at $270.17, which reflects a decrease of 2.57% in the last 24 hours. It is hovering close to critical Bollinger Band support. The governance of AAVE has suggested a reduction in the daily emissions of AAVE tokens from 390 to 300.

data.title: FalconX introduces Ethereum Staking Rate Forwards referencing Treehouse's TESR with institutional participation.
data.description: In Singapore on September 25, 2025, FalconX facilitated the initial Forward transactions using the Treehouse Ethereum Staking Rate (TESR). Noteworthy institutional participants such as Edge Capital, Monarq, and Mirana were involved in these transactions. FalconX, a prominent institutional digital asset prime broker, oversaw this milestone event.

data.title: Crypto community faces a sophisticated X account takeover using phishing to bypass passwords and 2FA, targeting X personalities' accounts.
data.description: A recent phishing scheme is targeting cryptocurrency figures, gaining unauthorized access to their X accounts. The campaign utilizes X's app authorization feature to evade passwords and two-factor authentication, making it difficult to detect.
